CONSENSUS CAPTURE — BP-2026-02-20-005

You are producing the final return for this deliberation session.

OUTPUT ONLY the return content. No commentary, no preamble, no sign-off.

RETURN HEADER (include all fields):
MEETING_ID: <value>
RETURN_TYPE: <value>
RECOMMENDED_STATUS: <value>
CONFLICTS_WITH: <value>
PROPOSES_BOUNDARY_CHANGE: <value>
R3_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED: <value>
EVIDENCE_PACK: <value>
OPEN_QUESTIONS: <value>
SYNTHESIS_PLANNED: <value>

---

REQUIRED SECTIONS:
- PRIMARY_DOMAINS_COUNT
- DOMAIN_DECISIONS_MAPPING
- INTERFACE_CANDIDATES (minimum: 3)
- DECISION_ROADMAP

STOP CONDITION (must be satisfied):
All decisions assigned to exactly one domain (or flagged cross-cutting with owner), >=3 interface candidates recorded, and >=2 roadmap gates defined.
